data.title: Dow Jones rises before inflation data, while AI stock drops on poor sales. Live updates on Market Today.
data.description: The stock market saw positive movement today as the Dow Jones index experienced a rise before the release of crucial inflation data. Conversely, an artificial intelligence (AI) company's stock took a hit due to disappointing sales figures. This event was covered in real-time by Investor's Business Daily. The Dow Jones index witnessed an increase, while the AI stock faced a decline in response to its earnings report.

data.title: Proficient hodlers strategically use disciplined DCA and rules-based systems to buy crypto dips, avoiding impulsive decisions.
data.description: Experienced investors do not react impulsively to market fluctuations; instead, they establish predetermined investment proportions, rely on automated systems to make purchases based on specific criteria, and implement Dollar Cost Averaging strategies as part of a methodical, analytics-driven approach to decision-making.

data.title: FDA approves Bristol Myers' Breyanzi for relapsed MZL, marking its 5th approval for different cancers, becoming top CAR T therapy.
data.description: Yesterday, the FDA gave the green light to Bristol Myers Squibb & Co.'s Breyanzi (lisocabtagene maraleucel; liso-cel), a CD19-directed chimeric antigen receptor (CAR) T cell therapy, for adult patients with relapsed or refractory marginal zone lymphoma (MZL). This one-time infusion treatment is now approved for this condition, making Breyanzi the sole FDA-approved CAR T cell therapy for five cancer types, the most among CD19-directed CAR T cell therapies. For more details, check out the complete article on Benzinga.com.
Canadian swap market prices in 15 basis points of the BoC tightening in 2026, up from 5 basis points before jobs gain.

data.title: Article discusses Philippines data center landscape: 28 existing, Manila dominant hub, Cavite as secondary cluster.
data.description: Dublin - The database "Philippines Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. Currently, there are approximately 28 data centers in the Philippines, with Manila being the most prominent location. Manila continues to be the primary data center hub in the country, housing the majority of both existing and anticipated facilities. Additionally, Cavite is quickly establishing itself as a growing secondary cluster. The upcoming data center market in the Philippines is on the rise.

data.title: ResearchAndMarkets.com adds Malaysia Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio report, with 46 existing and 46 upcoming centers by 2028.
data.description: A recent report on Malaysia's data center landscape reveals a total of 46 existing data centers across the country. Notable cities such as Iskandar Puteri, Sedenak, Cyberjaya, and Johor are key locations for these facilities. Between 2024 and 2025, a considerable number of new data centers are set to be operational, including KL1 and JH1 by Equinix and JHB1 by Airtrunk. Other prominent players in the market include Bridge Data Centres, GDS Services, and YTL Data Center Holdings. This information comes from the "Malaysia Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database, now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com.

data.title: Ginkgo Bioworks receives $47M contract from PNNL to deliver phenotyping platform for DOE's M2PC.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Ginkgo Bioworks (NYSE: DNA) revealed they have secured a contract from the Environmental Molecular Sciences Laboratory (EMSL) at Pacific Northwest National Laboratory (PNNL). This 4-year contract is valued at up to $47 million and involves collaborating to co-design, construct, and incorporate a new system.

data.title: 86 existing data centers, 23 upcoming data centers, and 36 major operators/investors in Indonesia. Jakarta leads with 450 MW estimated power capacity.
data.description: The database "Indonesia Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. Indonesia currently has over 85 existing data centers, mainly concentrated in regions such as Jakarta and West Java. Jakarta stands out as a key player in the upcoming data center market in Indonesia, boasting an anticipated power capacity of approximately 450 MW. Despite Jakarta's dominance in both capacity and development, Batam is gradually emerging as a notable secondary location in the country's data center industry.

data.title: AeroVironment appoints Milancy Harris as VP & CSO, adding strong national security experience; enhancing protection efforts.
data.description: A new development in Arlington, Virginia has recently been announced as Milancy Harris has been appointed as the Vice President and Chief Security Officer of AV. With a focus on bolstering the defense of individuals, projects, and overall mission, Harris is set to leverage her extensive background in national security. This move is aimed at enhancing safeguards and security measures within the organization.

data.title: Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY) to attend Raymond James TMT and Consumer Conference in New York on December 9, 2025. Join their presentation at 8:40 AM ET.
data.description: Atlanta-based company Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY) has shared plans to participate in the Raymond James TMT and Consumer Conference on December 9, 2025, in New York, NY. The event will include a fireside chat with management commencing at 8:40 AM ET. Those interested can tune into the presentation via the company’s investor relations website at https://investor.corpay.com/. Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY) is known as a leading corporate payments company on a global scale.

data.title: Lumen appoints Jim Fowler as Chief Technology & Product Officer, effective Jan. 5, 2026. Dave Ward will move to Salesforce as President and Chief Architect. Fowler to report to Lumen CEO Kate Johnson. Ward will support transition till Jan. 23.
data.description: In Denver, Lumen Technologies (NYSE: LUMN) revealed the appointment of Jim Fowler as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Technology & Product Officer from January 5, 2026. Fowler will take over from Dave Ward, who is leaving to become the President and Chief Architect at Salesforce, a leading AI CRM company. Ward will assist in the transition until January 23, 2026. Fowler's reporting line will be to Lumen CEO Kate Johnson, and he will oversee technological and product strategies at Lumen.

data.title: Expion Health introduces Qlare, an AI tool on ExpionIQ platform revolutionizing prescription cost decision-making. Coming soon.
data.description: Today, Expion Health from North Bethesda, Maryland, revealed the introduction of Qlare™ on Dec. 5, 2025. This innovative addition to the ExpionIQ® platform is set to revolutionize the way healthcare executives leverage prescription cost information for decision-making. Qlare is expected to be released in the near future, offering an enhanced user experience for accessing crucial data.

data.title: Switchblade Flying Car showcased at Sand & Fun Airshow in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia to boost tourism. From Prineville, Oregon.
data.description: A flying car known as the Switchblade is being hailed as a solution to boost tourism and business travel in Saudi Arabia. The Sand & Fun Airshow 2025 in Riyadh showcased the innovative vehicle, with the event attracting a significant crowd. This flying car represents a unique transportation option, offering convenience and efficiency for travelers in the region. The event took place on Dec. 5, 2025, in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, and featured various exhibitors showcasing cutting-edge aviation technology. The Switchblade flying car has the potential to revolutionize transportation in the Middle East, offering a glimpse into the future of travel.

data.title: USA TODAY Co. partners with Meta for AI licensing, giving access to content from 200+ local publications.
data.description: USA TODAY Co., Inc. (NYSE: TDAY) has unveiled a multi-year strategic collaboration with Meta, gaining access to a wide range of content from USA TODAY, 200+ local USA TODAY Network publications, and the USA TODAY Sports wires. Meta's various apps and devices will now showcase news and up-to-date information from reputable local and national news sources through this partnership. Being the leading publishing and digital media organization nationally, this move solidifies their position in providing quality content to Meta's audience.

data.title: Analysis on Singapore's data center market: 44 existing centers, 6 upcoming centers, and key operators/investors.
data.description: Dublin – A database on the "Singapore Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. Approximately 44 current data centers operate in Singapore, with Eastern and Southern regions holding a significant share. These regions represent over 65% of the upcoming data center power capacity in the nation. Equinix, ST Telemedia Global Data Centers, and Keppel DC REIT are prominent players in the data center landscape.
A UAV has been detected in the airspace of Kyiv region. Air defense forces are engaging the targets- reports

data.title: Jeffs’ Brands' subsidiary KeepZone AI Inc. has entered a definitive distribution agreement with Scanary Ltd., marking their entry into the global homeland security market.
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel, December 5, 2025 - Jeffs' Brands Ltd, a data-driven e-commerce company listed on Nasdaq under tickers JFBR and JFBRW, disclosed today that its subsidiary KeepZone AI Inc. has finalized a distribution agreement with Scanary Ltd., a deep-tech company from Israel specialized in 3D imaging, electromagnetic, and AI-driven threat detection systems. This deal signifies Jeffs' Brands' move into the rapidly expanding global homeland security industry.

data.title: Dow futures rise as investors await inflation data. Netflix acquires Warner Bros for $82.7B, job cuts down by 53%. Fed likely to cut rates in December. SPY up 0.24% at $686.03, QQQ up 0.34% at $625.05 premarket. Netflix down 4.38%, WBD up 0.61% pre-bell.
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose after a mixed Thursday, with major benchmark indices higher. Investors await the Federal Reserve's September inflation gauge delayed by the government shutdown. Netflix Inc. (NFLX) will acquire Warner Bros Discovery (WBD) for $82.7 billion. U.S. job cuts fell 53% in November to 71,321, still 24% higher than the previous year amidst soft demand and rising costs. Treasury bond yields were at 4.11% and 3.53%. The FedWatch tool shows an 87% probability of a rate cut in December. Dow Jones (-0.03%), S&P 500 (0.18%), Nasdaq 100 (0.38%), Russell 2000 (-0.04%) futures changed. SPY ($686.03) and QQQ ($625.05) ETFs tracking S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 were up. NFLX was down 4.38% in premarket, while WBD was up 0.61%.

data.title: Fresno postal franchisee renews commitment to community; Annex Brands, Inc. celebrates franchise renewal in shipping, office services.
data.description: Annex Brands, Inc. is pleased to announce the renewal of its franchise, securing the ongoing provision of critical packing, shipping, and office services. The news was revealed on December 5, 2025, in San Diego. Annex Brands, Inc. is a prominent franchisor specializing in these industries. The renewal ensures the maintenance of essential services, underscoring the company's commitment to serving its customers.
